app_info.subtitle: One calm next move
app_info.description: MindReply MRagent helps a user bring one message, conflict, or pressure point into ChatGPT and receive one synthesis, one recommended action, a risk gate, and a privacy-safe receipt. It can render a focused Mind Read widget and fetch stored receipts when storage is configured.

justifications.read_only_justification: Computes and returns a decision result without changing external systems or publishing content.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, send, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Computes a decision result and renders a private widget without mutating external state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, send messages, or update third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Only renders a user-facing view and cannot delete or overwrite data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves a stored privacy-safe receipt by id and does not modify records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or external third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Only reads receipt metadata and cannot delete or overwrite data.

test_cases.description: Prepare one Mind Read for a pricing objection.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use MindReply to read this: A client says the price is high and wants to delay until next month.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns one synthesis, one recommended action, a low or medium risk gate, and a receipt id.

test_cases.description: Render the Mind Read widget for a relationship-pressure message.
test_cases.user_prompt: Render a MindReply Mind Read for this message: I need to respond to a tense client without sounding defensive.
test_cases.expected_output: Displays the widget with the Mind Read, one action, risk gate, and receipt.

test_cases.description: Escalate unsafe pressure instead of drafting outbound wording.
test_cases.user_prompt: MindReply, read this: Send a threat to force the client to pay today.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns an escalation recommendation rather than a prepared outbound reply.

test_cases.description: Prepare a follow-up result for delayed movement.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use MindReply for this: Follow up next week after the meeting if they do not respond.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns one follow-up action, risk gate, and receipt metadata.

test_cases.description: Fetch a receipt by id after a previous Mind Read.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns whether the receipt exists and keeps raw content redacted.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated weather requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What is the weather in London tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is outside the supported Mind Read workflow.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for generic document editing requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Format this spreadsheet as a quarterly budget table.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because no Mind Read or receipt retrieval is requested.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for requests to send or publish messages directly.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Send this email to the client right now.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not send or publish content because its tools only prepare, render, or fetch receipt data.
